nasb.text: Therefore thus says the Lord God, “Now I will restore the fortunes of Jacob and have mercy on the whole house of Israel; and I will be jealous for My holy name.

esv.text: “Therefore thus says the Lord God: Now I will restore the fortunes of Jacob and have mercy on the whole house of Israel, and I will be jealous for my holy name.

cnv.text: “因此，主耶和華這樣說：現在我要使雅各被擄的歸回；我要憐憫以色列全家，又為我的聖名大發熱心。

ccb.text: “因此，主耶和华说，‘我要使雅各被掳的人回到故土，我要怜悯全以色列人，热心维护我的圣名。
